createBookingForGuest.introConfirmed: Hi {name}, you're all set for {title}. Here are your booking details.
createBookingForGuest.introPending: Hi {name}, we've sent your request for {title} to the host. We'll email you the moment it's confirmed.

createBookingForOwner.introPending: Hi {hostName}, {guestName} requested to book {title}. Confirm or decline it from your reservations.

createAccommodation.introLive: Hi {name}, {title} is now published and guests can book it. You can edit it anytime.
createAccommodation.introReview: Hi {name}, thanks for accommodation {title}. We're reviewing it and will let you know as soon as it's live.

accommodationPublished.subject: Your accommodation is now live · {title}
accommodationPublished.heading: Your accommodation is approved
accommodationPublished.intro: Hi {name}, {title} has been reviewed and is now live. Guests can book it right away.

accommodationSuspended.subject: Your accommodation has been suspended · {title}
accommodationSuspended.heading: Your accommodation was suspended
accommodationSuspended.intro: Hi {name}, {title} has been suspended and is no longer visible to guests. If you think this is a mistake, reply to this email and we'll help.

bookingConfirmed.subject: Your booking is confirmed · {code}
bookingConfirmed.heading: Your booking is confirmed!
bookingConfirmed.intro: Hi {name}, good news — the host confirmed your booking for {title}. We can't wait to host you.

bookingCancelled.subject: Your booking was cancelled · {code}
bookingCancelled.heading: Booking cancelled
bookingCancelled.intro: Hi {name}, your booking for {title} ({code}) has been cancelled. If this wasn't expected, reply to this email and we'll help.

bookingDeclined.subject: Your booking request was declined — {code}
bookingDeclined.heading: Booking request declined
bookingDeclined.intro: Hi {name}, unfortunately your request for {title} ({code}) was declined by the host. The reason they gave is below — we hope you find a great stay elsewhere.

bookingAutoDeclined.subject: Your booking request expired — {code}
bookingAutoDeclined.heading: Booking request expired
bookingAutoDeclined.intro: Hi {name}, your request for {title} ({code}) expired because it wasn't confirmed in time. No charge was made — we hope you find a great stay elsewhere.
